violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk cooler #2 in the cafeteria as well as the 2-door reach-in freezer in the kitchen. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris in the cafeteria area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Food items were observed on the floor from lunch the previous day. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk cooler #2 in the cafeteria. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the air circulating fan in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and/or food debris in the cafeteria area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Food items were observed on the floor from lunch the previous day. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The gaskets for milk chest #1, and #3 are in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The floor under the dip and dots cooler in the cafeteria has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The floor under the dish machine area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The gaskets for milk chest #1 and #4 were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024

The floors under the 3-bay sink, and freezers in cafeteria have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to continue to clean all droppings using proper methods of cleaning. Establishment is to continue working with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The floor under the dishwasher was observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Pest droppings were observed behind equipment in the kitchen and cafeteria. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrective Action - establishment is to continue to clean, all droppings. Establishment is to continue working with pest control. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
The floor behind the dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2024

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity food products were observed stored in milk cases, freezers and stand up refrigerators were observed completely full. Establishment must fix or replace stand up fridge, establishment needs to increase freezer capacity. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2023
milk case lid gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2023

The floor in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must continue to clean to eliminate droppings, establishment must continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The gasket on milk case two was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023

The restroom in the hallway by the kitchen, was observed with the toilet leaking on to the floor from the handle used to flush the toilet. Corrective Action - Establishment is to have toilet fixed. Evidence of the repair is to be sent to RIDOH. Toilet room is not to be used until repair has been made. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
